features.evidence: Battery life lasts a full day for me, and power management is steady without overheating during normal use. The refurbished S24+ is great, the battery especially holds a bigger charge and the cpu is more efficient than the s21.

Bottom line: If you want flagship power with practical savings, this renewed S24+ delivers the performance, clarity, and premium feel you hope for. ✅ Pros:✔ Excellent renewed condition — near-factory clean look✔ Powerful, efficient processing for smooth performance✔ Large 256GB storage is practical for heavy use✔ Unlocked model adds flexibility for carriers and travel✔ Strong 5G and connectivity performance✔ Reliable for daily work, media, and accessories✔ No jitters, crashes, or odd performance spikes⚠ Cons / tips:• Renewed means it’s not box-new — accessories may vary, so keep a spare USB-C cable or adapter handy if needed.• Higher-end features work best when paired with good charging gear (GaN blocks, fast adapters, etc.), which is normal for any flagship phone.•

The storage is 256gb, its pretty big for my needs because I already have quite a bit of apps taking up the 1st 100gb+ aswell the needed space for the occasional updates for apps and software updates. This phone replaced my old Galaxy S21 Plus as it no longer had software updates.
The screen is gorgeous — vivid, sharp, and buttery smooth, making reading, browsing, and streaming feel premium. The display is great, 1440p with adaptive 120hz.
value: display pixel density: 513 Pixels Per Inch (PPI)

The processor handles multitasking and heavier apps with zero slowdown, and the 256GB storage gives plenty of headroom for media and large apps.

The phone looks like new and works great, it is a nice way to get a one year old phone for almost 50% off the price of a new phone. It's a great balance of price to performance if your coming from the s21 generationThe only gray opinion I have is that the screen is significantly bigger than the s21 and it is heavier significantly, it feels different to hold it

When checking the physical screen for imperfections there was a incredibly small single line scratch that was only noticeable if you shine a light on it and bother to search for the scratchThe camera is significantly higher quality for taking pictures as well, im not a taking pictures kind of guy
